locale_picker.label: Reo

region.middle-east-africa: Te Pā ki Te Rāwhiti me Āwherika

locale_picker.contribute: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo

hero.headline_a: Ka taea e koe te matapae i te Ipu Whutuporo o te Ao katoa?
hero.headline_b: E rua tekau mā rua ngā Ipu Whutuporo, 964 ngā kēmu, kāhore he pukapuka tika i tutuki.
hero.lede: Kāhore tētahi i tutuki, ā, nā te nui rawa o ngā {odds_link}, kāhore pea e tutuki ake. E rua tekau mā rua ngā Ipu Whutuporo, 964 ngā kēmu, kāhore anō kia kitea he pukapuka tino tika. Ko ngā kēmu 104 o 2026 te whakamātau hou. Ka pupuri a Tournamental i te pukapuka taupū o te ao, ka tuhia ia matapae ki te poraka mua i te whakaaranga o ia kēmu, nō reira kāhore e taea te whakarerekē, ā, ka taea anō te whakamana i te kōrero kororia.
hero.lede_link: ngā āheinga ki te tika i ngā kēmu 104 katoa

final.headline: Toru hīkoi. Rima meneti. Utukore.
final.q1_body: Whakatuwheratia te tūtohi, tiakina tō Ipu Whutuporo o te Ao. Mō te rima meneti i te wā tuatahi.
final.q2_body: Ka tīmata te Ipu Whutuporo o te Ao FIFA 2026 i te 11 o Pipiri. Tiakina kotahi, panonihia he matapae i mua i te whakaaranga, ka mātakihia tō IQ matapae e piki ana i te pae arataki o te ao.
final.q3_body: I rata koe? Whakatūria he puna, waitohutia, karangahia ō hoa, tō hunga whakarongo rānei. Utu kore, utu nui rānei.

step1.headline: Tukua ngā matapae ināianei.
step1.lede: 104 kēmu, 48 kapa, kotahi te tūtohi. Tīpakohia ngā toa, ngā kaute me ngā tūnga rōpū. Tiakina kotahi, ka ngāwari ki te panoni ia kēmu tae noa ki te whakaaranga. Ko te tiaki wawe ka nui ake te whakarea; rakatia te katoa ina rite, ka mātakihia tō IQ matapae e piki ana.
step1.b1_strong: Panonihia ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
step1.b1_body: He rerekē ki te Telegraph, ESPN, Yahoo rānei, kāhore he mea e rakatia ana i te whīra tuatahi. Ko ia kēmu, he whakatau motuhake.
step1.b2_body: Ki te kī koe i tēnei rā ka toa a Akenetina i te whiringa toa, ka nui ake ngā piro i te kī ki te pō o mua.
step1.b3_body: Ka whai hāneatanga me te waitohu (VStamp) ia matapae. Nōu tō rēkoata, ka taea te kawe i waenga puna.

step2.headline: Whakatūria he puna. Waitohutia kia hāngai ki a koe.
step2.claim: Ko te papamahi matapae Ipu Whutuporo anake ka taea e tētahi tangata te whakatū puna kua waitohutia, ka taea te whakauru, me ngā wehenga utu motuhake, me te whakatau on-chain manapou, i te wā poto.
step2.lede: He puna te puna matapae āu ake, kua waitohutia. Whakaingoatia, whakauruhia te kōnae embed ki tētahi pae (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, tō pukapuka tuhituhi) ka whakahaere whakataetae e ono wiki te roa mā tō hunga whakarongo. Whakaritea he utu uru me te wehenga utu, ka noho utu kore rānei mō te kororia. E kore a Tournamental e pā ki te moni.
step2.cta_note: Tirohia te kōnae embed, te snippet me te ārahi wehenga utu i te whārangi puna.

tier_free.tag: Utu kore mō ake tonu atu
tier_free.name: Kōnae embed kua waitohutia
tier_free.b1: Tukuna he snippet ki tētahi pae, ki tētahi CMS
tier_free.b2: Waitohutia ki tō tohu, ngā tae me ngā kupu utu
tier_free.b3: Ngā wāhanga raupapa whenua + tāone + ao
tier_free.b4: Moni uru i waho i te papamahi (māu te moni hei whakahaere)
tier_free.b5: Pae kaitautoko i ia kāri tohaina
tier_free.cta: Tīmataria utu kore i te 60 hēkona

tier_premium.b1: Ngā mea katoa o te Utu Kore
tier_premium.b2: Pūkete āpiti HighLevel CRM kua tino whakahaeretia
tier_premium.b3: Tō nama waea mō te SMS + WhatsApp i te nui
tier_premium.b4: Stripe Checkout mō ngā uru utu (moni ki tō pēke)
tier_premium.b5: Whakaata rohenui āpiti + embed kāhore he footer
tier_premium.cta: Tirohia ngā mea ka tukuna e te premium

home.tier_aside: Ka tukuna te paparanga premium e Aiva, tō mātou hoa CRM me te karere. E kore a Tournamental e pā ki ngā utu uru me ngā utu paraihe.

features.headline: He aha te take e noho ai ngā tāngata
features.f1_body: Ka whai VStamp tuihono ia matapae i mua i te whakaaranga. He kawe ai tō rēkoata, he tūmatanui, nōu mō ō rā katoa.
features.f2_body: Waehere Apache 2.0, tuhinga CC-BY, wehe moni ki ngā kaitoha mā Drips. Kapehia, manaakihia e koe, noho mai rānei.
features.f3_body: Whakamātautau o te rā kēmu, line bet, kēmu kuhu kaute mā te Telegram bot. E ono wiki o ngā wāhi pā, kaua ko te rima meneti o te puka.
features.f4_title: I hangaia ki runga i ngā raraunga ao
features.f4_body: Raraunga tuwhera StatsBomb, ngā tūponotanga Polymarket, raraunga whutupōro tūmatanui. Ka utu mātou i ngā puna; ka tohaina e rātou ngā piro pai.

countdown.title_default: Mēhiko vs Āwherika ki te Tonga, 11 o Pipiri 2026

modal.title: Hono atu ki {pool_name}
modal.body: Tīpakohia he ingoa whakaatu me he tohu mō te pae arataki, ka tukua atu e mātou he waehere takitahi mā WhatsApp, mā īmēra rānei.
modal.field_handle: Tohu (ka kitea i te pae arataki)
modal.field_phone: Nama waea pūkoro (mō te takiuru WhatsApp)
modal.field_email_help: Ki te kore koe e whakamahi i a WhatsApp, tukuna mai tō wāhitau īmēra ki te whiwhi waehere takitahi. Kōwhiritia tētahi, tētahi atu rānei, ngā mea e rua rānei, ka tukuna te waehere ki ngā ara katoa ka tukuna mai e koe.
modal.footnote: Mā te hono atu, ka whakaae koe ki ā mātou tikanga. Ka whakamahia ō kōrero whakapā mō te takiuru anake, kāhore he hokohoko, kāhore he hunga tuatoru.

success.body_active: Nau mai ki {pool_name}. E uta ana i tō pukapuka…
success.body_pending: Kua tukuna tō tono ki te uru ki {pool_name} ki te kaiwhakahaere o te puna. Ka pānui atu mātou ki a koe ina whakaaengia.

error.phone_registered_strong: Kua rēhita kē taua nama waea.
error.phone_registered_body: Mēnā nōu, takiuru ki roto i WhatsApp, ka whiwhi koe i te waehere takitahi me te hononga takiuru pātō-tahi, kātahi ka tāpiri aunoa atu mātou i a koe ki {pool_name}.
error.handle_invalid: Kaore tenei whakahaere e whakatika. Reta, nama me te raro-raro, 2-32 konae.
error.handle_taken: Aroha mai, kua riro a "{handle}" kee. Whirihia he whakahaere rerekee.
error.code_invalid: Whakauru i te tohu mati 6 mai i au karere.
error.code_invalid_email: Whakauru i te tohu mati 6 mai i au imera.
error.code_expired: Kaore i tutuki tenei tohu. Kua whakamahia pea kee, kua mate ranei, tonoa he hou.
error.code_throttled: He nui rawa nga whakamatau mai i tenei kupenga. Tatari tetahi meneti ka whakamahi ano.
error.send_failed: Kaore i taea e matou te tonua i he tohu aunoa. Panga i te poutaka WhatsApp ki raro kia tono atu ki a matou, ka riro i a koe te tohu me te hononga whakamiharo.
error.rate_limited: He nui rawa nga katinga o muri nei. Whakamahi ano i roto {seconds}s.
error.bad_phone: Kaore tenei nama waea e whakatika te ahua. Whakauru i te nama whenua.
error.email_not_configured: Kaore te whakatomo imera i whakatakotoria. Whakamahi WhatsApp.
error.send_error: Kaore i taea te tonua i he tohu. Whakamahi ano i muri ake nei.
error.email_invalid: Whakauru i tetahi pouaka imera e whakatika ana.
error.email_cooldown: Kua tonua e matou he tohu i ite nei, tatari tetahi wa, ka tirotiro i au pouaka.
error.email_send_failed: Kaore i taea te tonua i he tohu imera. Tirotiroia te pouaka, ka whakamahi ano.

verify.title: Whakauru i au tohu
verify.label_whatsapp: Kua puta e matou he tohu mati 6 i runga WhatsApp ki a {phone}. Panga i te hononga i roto i te karere hei whakatomo tanu, hei whakapiri ranei i te tohu ki konei.
verify.label_email: Kua puta e matou he tohu mati 6 i te imera ki a {email}. Whakapiria ki raro hei whakatomo.
verify.label_generic: Kua puta e matou he tohu mati 6. Whakapiria ki raro hei whakatomo.
verify.button_whatsapp: 💬 Tuwhera WhatsApp me te karere ki a matou
verify.button_send_email: Tuku i te tohu ma te imera
verify.fallback_lede: Kaore koe e whakamahi WhatsApp? Toro i te tohu ma te imera.
verify.fallback_sent: Kua tonua te tohu imera. Whakamahia te whakauru i runga ki te whakaihu, ka panga ki te Whakatupato i te tohu imera.
verify.email_sent: Kua tonua te tohu ki a {email}. Tirotiroia au pouaka (me te hereheretanga).

odds.title: Kāhore tētahi e tika i ngā kēmu Ipu Whutuporo 104 katoa. Mō ake tonu atu.
odds.lede: Ka patua koe e te whakahonohono o ngā tūponotanga, ka whakatakotoria he papa e ngā kēmu tāwhirowhiro-rānei-tautauwhā e kore e taea e te mōhiotanga te wāwāhi, ka pakaru pāngarau ngā kēmu rakatia-katoa-i-te-tīmatanga i mua i te whīra tuatahi. Anei ngā tatauranga.

stage.r32: Te Tekau mā Ono Whiringa Toa

syndicate.members: {count, plural, =0 {Kāhore he mema} one {# mema} other {# ngā mema}}
syndicate.picks_made: {count, plural, =0 {Kāhore he matapae} one {# matapae kua tukua} other {# ngā matapae kua tukua}}
syndicate.join_footnote: Utu kore, taea te whakarerekē i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.

footer.fifa_disclaimer: He motuhake a Tournamental, kāhore e hono ana, kāhore e tautokona ana, kāhore e whakaaetia ana e FIFA, e te Ipu Whutuporo o te Ao FIFA, e tētahi o ō rātou kaitautoko hoki. He tohu hokohoko rēhita a FIFA World Cup 2026™ nō te Fédération Internationale de Football Association.
footer.open_source: Pūtake mātāhuri ki raro i te Apache 2.0
footer.contribute_translation: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo: {link}

hero.headline: Tournamental, i tō reo
hero.intro1: Kei te mahi tahi mātou ki ngā kaikōrero matatini ki te whakarewa i a Tournamental ki ngā reo 22 hei te whakaaranga. Ka āwhinatia te tukunga tuatahi e te mīhini; ko ngā tono kume nā ngā kaikōrero matatini ka tino pai ai ia whakareo.
hero.intro2: Pātōngia he reo i raro nei hei whakawhiti. Ka mahara mātou ki tō kōwhiringa mō te kotahi tau ki tēnei pūrere.

languages.contribute_link: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo

syndicates_page.hero_title: The whole tournament, gamified for your audience.
syndicates_page.hero_claim: The only World Cup prediction platform where anyone can launch a fully branded, embeddable syndicate with custom prize splits and verifiable on-chain settlement in minutes.
syndicates_page.hero_lede: A syndicate is your own branded prediction pool. Drop the embed widget on any site, run a six-week game with your own prize. Free forever; premium adds a fully-managed CRM, your own messaging, and paid-entry handling.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce store
ecommerce.body: Six weeks of customer engagement with no sport-knowledge required. Winner gets a store voucher. Picks-saved climbs in your storefront via the embed widget.

radio.title: Radio station
radio.body: Sponsor-funded prize draw with daily on-air mentions. Hosts call out the leaderboard each morning. One sponsor logo on every share card.

football.title: Football club
football.body: Member-only ladder for the senior squad's tournament watch-along. Tickets, signed merch, clubhouse-day presentation for the leader.

school.title: School fundraiser
school.body: Parents enter $10 each, all proceeds to the school. Local business sponsors the prize pack. Predictable fundraising plus sponsor goodwill.
school.prize: Sponsored bundle; fees to the school

workplace.title: Workplace bracket
workplace.body: Twelve floors, one ladder, $10 entry. Pin the bracket in the team channel. CEO presents the cheque at the post-final lunch.

creator.title: Creator / influencer
creator.body: Public syndicate under your own brand. One sponsor underwrites the whole tournament's content. Logo on every share card.
creator.prize: Sponsored bundle; you keep the fee

syndicates_page.usecases_aside: Each scenario gets a recruit-email template, week-by-week run-of-show, sponsor-pitch template, and prize-structure menu in the syndicate playbook.
syndicates_page.flow_title: How it lands on your audience
syndicates_page.flow_step1_body: One script tag on any page. Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, or hand-rolled HTML. Renders your branded bracket, leaderboard, and sign-up form inline.
syndicates_page.flow_step2_body: They enter on your site, no bounce to ours. We create the account, save their picks, surface them on your leaderboard.
syndicates_page.flow_step3_body: Daily reminders, leaderboard climbs, share cards, and the 3D watch-along run for six weeks. Premium adds your own SMS/WhatsApp/email via your CRM.

tier_free.name: Branded embed
tier_free.blurb: Embed the widget on any site you own. Leaderboards, share cards, prediction game. Forever free.
tier_free.f1: Branded embed widget for any site
tier_free.f3: Logo, colours, hero image, prize copy
tier_free.f5: Country, city, and global leaderboard slices
tier_free.f6: 3D match watch-along and the full game
tier_free.f7: Share cards for every member and climb
tier_free.footer: No credit card. Cancel anytime (it's free).

tier_premium.blurb_middle: provisions a dedicated HighLevel sub-account, pre-configured for Tournamental-style workflows. BYO HighLevel via Aiva's affiliate link is supported.
tier_premium.f2: Dedicated HighLevel CRM sub-account, managed by Aiva
tier_premium.f3: Your own number for SMS and WhatsApp at scale
tier_premium.f4: Email campaigns, nurture workflows, behavioural triggers
tier_premium.f5: Stripe Checkout for paid entries (funds to your bank)
tier_premium.f8: Remove the Tournamental footer from your embed

syndicates_page.pricing_aside: Premium tier is delivered by Aiva. Tournamental never handles entry fees or prize money; Stripe sits inside your CRM sub-account and funds settle directly to your bank.
syndicates_page.embed_intro: Drop these two lines anywhere on your site. The widget reads your syndicate slug, fetches your branding, and renders. Here's the same widget running against a demo syndicate, live on this page:
syndicates_page.embed_snippet_intro: That widget is rendered by exactly this snippet (substitute your slug):
syndicates_page.embed_aside: Works on Squarespace, WordPress, Wix, Shopify, Webflow, and any custom site. No iframe required, no host-CSS bleed, cached at the edge.
syndicates_page.faq_q1: Is it really free? What's the catch?
syndicates_page.faq_a1: Genuinely free, no card needed, no trial timer. You can run a syndicate, brand it, embed it, and watch your audience play for the whole tournament without paying us a cent. Premium ($97/mo via Aiva) is an optional upgrade for hosts who want a managed CRM, paid entries via Stripe, and outbound SMS / WhatsApp at scale. Most syndicates run free forever.
syndicates_page.faq_q2: How do members find my syndicate?
syndicates_page.faq_a2: Two ways. Either you embed the widget on your site (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, custom) and members join straight from your page, or you share the public landing link (play.tournamental.com/s/yourname) directly on social, email, group chats, posters. Most hosts do both.
syndicates_page.faq_q3: Do my members need a Tournamental account?
syndicates_page.faq_a3: They sign up via your widget or landing page with email or phone. The experience is yours; the technology is ours. No app install required.
syndicates_page.faq_a4: You do, always. Tournamental does not touch money. On free, you settle however you already do (PayPal, bank transfer, an envelope at the post-final pub). On premium, Aiva's HighLevel sub-account gives you a Stripe-Connect checkout and the funds land in your bank account directly. We never have custody.
syndicates_page.faq_q5: Can I brand the widget without paying?
syndicates_page.faq_a5: Yes. Logo, colours, hero image, prize copy, and a sponsor block are all free. Premium removes the small 'Powered by Tournamental' footer and adds the managed CRM on top.
syndicates_page.faq_q6: Can I run this for tournaments other than the World Cup?
syndicates_page.faq_a6: Soon. Six Nations, Cricket World Cup, college brackets, your office annual ladder, the same toolkit applies. The World Cup 2026 setup is the launch tournament; new ones light up as the seasons roll.
syndicates_page.faq_a7: Your syndicate stays live on the free tier. Your members are yours. Aiva keeps your CRM data accessible for 30 days so you can export it. There is no lock-in.
syndicates_page.faq_a8: Yes, Apache 2.0. The whole platform is in the public GitHub repo. Contributors share platform revenue via the Drips Network.
syndicates_page.cta_final_body: Office, friends, fan club, school, store, creator audience. Same toolkit. 60 seconds to a branded path. Free forever.

bracket.title: Call every match of the FIFA World Cup 2026™
bracket.subtitle: Group standings update live from your picks. Save each pick before its match kicks off; you can edit any call right up to the whistle.
bracket.autopick_subtitle_empty: Fill your bracket using live consensus odds, you can edit any pick before kickoff.
bracket.autopick_subtitle_partial: Refresh empty picks using live consensus odds.
bracket.autopick_title_attr: Auto-pick every match: Polymarket odds for groups, world ranking for knockouts
bracket.round_help_knockout: Tap the team you predict will advance. Slots fill in as you finish the previous round.
bracket.empty_state: Make your group-stage picks first, slots fill in here as you pick.
bracket.group_autopick_modal_body: This will clear any picks you've already made in Group {id} and replace them with the favourites from live Polymarket odds. The rest of your bracket stays untouched. You can edit any pick afterwards.
bracket.standings_hint_empty: Pick the outcomes of each match to see predicted standings.
bracket.standings_hint_incomplete: Standings update live as you pick. Predict all 6 matches for a final order.
bracket.tiebreaker_hint_single: {teams} are tied on points + goal difference. Drag (desktop) or use the arrows to rank them.
bracket.tiebreaker_hint_multiple: Multiple ties detected. Rank each tied block below.
bracket.modal_title_autopick_confirm: Auto-pick the favourite for every match?
bracket.modal_body_autopick_confirm: Auto-pick uses live Polymarket odds for the group stage. The knockout rounds don't have Polymarket markets open yet (matchups aren't known until groups conclude), so those fall back to world ranking. Your existing picks will be overwritten.
bracket.modal_body_autopick_confirm_2: You can change any pick afterwards, auto-pick is a starting point, not a final answer. Picks save as you tweak them.
bracket.save_incomplete: {count} {count_label} to lock in your bracket and share.
bracket.save_complete_headline: All 104 picks made. Lock in your bracket.
bracket.save_complete_authed: Saves your bracket to your profile so it follows you across devices.
bracket.save_complete_anon: We'll send a one-time sign-in code (Telegram, WhatsApp, or email). Your picks here will merge into your profile automatically.
bracket.save_saved_headline: Bracket saved. You can edit any pick before kickoff.
bracket.save_profile_hint: Add a profile photo so your friends can spot you on the leaderboard.
bracket.final_note: You can change any pick right up until that match kicks off. Saving now lets you share your bracket and locks in your odds-at-pick for scoring.
bracket.lock_counts: {group} / {group_total} group matches, {knockout} / {knockout_total} knockout picks, {tiebreaker} tiebreakers set
bracket.submit_state_saved: Bracket saved. You can change any pick before kickoff.
bracket.submit_state_saved_offline: Saved offline, we'll retry when you're back online.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_no_odds: auto-pick: couldn't load odds; nothing changed.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_group_no_odds: auto-pick group {id}: live odds not loaded yet, try again in a moment.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_complete: auto-picked {group} group + {knockout} knockout + {tiebreaker} tiebreakers (source: {source}). Adjust any you disagree with.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_group_complete: auto-picked group {id} ({count} matches). Adjust any you disagree with.
bracket.match_locked_banner: This match has started; picks are locked.

save.remaining: {count, plural, one {# matapae anō} other {# matapae anō}} kia rakatia tō tūtohi me te tohatoha.
save.saved: Kua tiakina te tūtohi. Ka taea te panoni i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
save.saved_foot: Tāpirihia he whakaahua kōtaha kia mōhio ai ō hoa ki a koe ki te pae arataki.
save.complete_headline: 104 ngā matapae kua oti. Rakatia tō tūtohi.
save.foot_authed: Ka tiaki i tō tūtohi ki tō kōtaha kia haere tahi tonu me koe i ngā pūrere katoa.
save.foot_anon: Ka tukuna he waehere takiuru kotahi (Telegram, WhatsApp, īmēra rānei). Ka hono aunoa ō matapae ki tō kōtaha.

submit.saved_offline: Kua tiakina i te wā kāhore he hononga, ka whakamātauhia anō ina hoki mai koe.

syndicate.leaderboard_dateline: Ikinui 5 ki roto i te tauranga
syndicate.leaderboard_empty: Ka whakahohe te tauranga i te timata, te taakaro tuatahi ko Mekiho me te ao, 11 Inu 2026.
syndicate.share_text: I a koe, ka taea e koe te whakamoemoe i te hua i te FIFA Whorld Kopa pai ake i a au? Haere mai ki te roopu "{name}" a ka mohio ai.
syndicate.money_disclaimer: Kaore a Tournamental e whakahaere i te moni.
syndicate.money_with_fee: Ka kohia e te kaikaipoi nga utu whakatupuranga me te utua o te roopu.

not_found.title: Kaore i kitea te hononga wehewehe
not_found.body: Kaore i kitea e matou tena whakamoemoe, tena roopu ranei. Tohunga he whakamoemoe hou, kua tata te timata i tou whakaaro.
